goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to discover what film-related content is available
Search for specific film recommendation or analysis files by name pattern
Read the contents of relevant film files to gather recommendations and analysis
Save personal film recommendations or notes to the workspace

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and collaborative. Enjoys discovering new films through recommendations and analysis from fellow cinephiles.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about films and enjoys discussing recommendations but does not know the internal tool names or file system structure of the workspace.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, found and read relevant film-related files, and saved their own recommendations or notes to share with their film forum community.
